completed_tasks.title: Inicializar projeto Next.js 14 com TypeScript strict, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Prisma
Criar Prisma schema completo
completed_tasks.notes: All models created: User, Subscription, Bar, Cocktail, Ingredient, CocktailIngredient, InventoryItem, UserDrink, Comment, ChatbotUsage

completed_tasks.title: Setup Vitest (unit) + Playwright (e2e)
completed_tasks.notes: Unit tests passing. Playwright configured. Example tests provided.

completed_tasks.title: Setup CI no GitHub Actions
completed_tasks.notes: CI pipeline configured: lint, type-check, test, build on push/PR. Includes e2e tests on PR.

completed_tasks.title: Arquitetura: Remover Prisma, usar Supabase Edge Functions
completed_tasks.notes: Prisma v7 PostgreSQL connection issues resolved by pivoting to Edge Functions. SQL DDL schema provided in CLAUDE.md. Supabase REST API verified working. Architecture docs updated.

completed_tasks.title: Criar schema PostgreSQL via Supabase SQL Editor
completed_tasks.notes: SQL DDL executed in Supabase SQL Editor. All 9 tables created: cocktails, ingredients, cocktail_ingredients, bars, inventory_items, subscriptions, user_drinks, comments, chatbot_usage. Indexes created for performance.

completed_tasks.title: Setup Supabase Edge Functions boilerplate
completed_tasks.notes: Created supabase/functions/ with 8 Edge Functions: hello, cocktails-crud, ingredients-crud, bars-crud, chatbot-rate-limit, subscriptions-crud, chatbot-rag, chatbot-cache, moderation. All written in Deno/TypeScript. supabase.json config created.

session_log.notes: Phase 0 setup complete. All linting, testing, and CI infrastructure configured. First commit made. Dev server running.
